feat.name: Repositioning Block
feat.text: As you absorb a blow from an enemy, you can use their attack's momentum against them. Attempt to Reposition the creature whose attack you used Shield Block against. You don't need to have a hand free to do so. You gain a +1 item bonus to the Athletics check if your shield is at least 4th level, a +2 item bonus if your shield is at least 10th level, and a +3 item bonus if your shield is at least 16th level.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.

feat.trigger: You used Shield Block to prevent damage from an adjacent creature’s attack.
